name: VPS Master Pro
author: admin@vpsmaster.pro
description: VPS Monitoring Dashboard built with React + Express. Supports custom domain via Cloudflare.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# VPS Master Pro - Installation Script
apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y git curl

# Install Node.js 20
curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash -
apt-get install -y nodejs

echo "Node: $(node --version)"
echo "NPM:  $(npm --version)"

# Clone or copy files
if [ -d /mnt/server ]; then
  cd /mnt/server
  if [ -f package.json ]; then
    echo "Files already present, installing dependencies..."
  fi
fi

echo "Installation complete!"

variables.name: Server Port
variables.description: Port yang digunakan server (harus sama dengan allocation di Pterodactyl)
